Passenger held after opening emergency exit on moving flight at Chennai airport
description: A tense situation unfolded at Chennai International Airport when a passenger reportedly opened an emergency exit on an Air Arabia flight from Sharjah. The aircraft, carrying 231 people, was taxiing when the incident occurred. Security forces swiftly responded, detaining the 34-year-old passenger for questioning and assessment of his mental state.

title: Mercedes in F1: Rise, fall, and rebirth of an empire
description: Mercedes dominated in an era of raw pace, then withdrew after a tragic accident. When they returned, they learned and built a seven-year period of dominance, after that a psychological setback. Now, they are experiencing yet another rebirth, with a completely different structure within the team.

description: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar 2' continues its phenomenal run, crossing Rs 1,138.54 crore in India net collections after 45 days. The film's 7th Saturday saw a significant surge, earning Rs 2.40 crore, pushing its gross worldwide total to Rs 1,788.32 crore. This success comes despite new releases, proving its enduring appeal.

description: Oracle faces a significant bank-debt challenge due to its massive data centre expansion for OpenAI, reportedly requiring $300 billion. Lenders struggle with exposure limits, impacting their ability to finance these projects.  This comes as Oracle also plans substantial job cuts, highlighting financial pressures despite efforts to secure funding.

'Cost between Rs 1,000 and Rs 5,000 per day': In Gujarat, bouncers hired to watch screen addicts
description: Desperate parents in Gujarat are hiring bouncers to manage teenagers battling severe phone, gaming, and drug addictions.  These security personnel, costing up to Rs 65,000 monthly, are deployed 24/7 to prevent violence, substance abuse, and risky behavior, highlighting a growing trend of extreme de-addiction measures.

title: UP horror: Masked men enter baraat, shoot groom dead in Jaunpur
description: A 22-year-old groom was shot dead by three men on a motorcycle during his wedding procession in Jaunpur. The prime accused, Pradeep Bind, allegedly had a rivalry with the victim, Azad Bind, and had threatened him over the marriage. Police have registered a murder case and launched a search for the accused.

title: IIT-Ropar PhD scholar alleges assault, sexual harassment by supervisor
description: A PhD scholar at IIT-Ropar has accused her supervisor of physical assault and sexual harassment, alleging he punched her after she refused inappropriate demands and threatened her academic future. She claims surveillance was used against her. IIT-Ropar stated action was taken, including forced leave for the faculty member and police referral, while the student awaits an ICC report.

Kerala verdict: Pinarayi Vijayan's welfare rule - will it fare well or get a farewell?
description: Kerala's upcoming election sees the LDF government banking on its development model and welfare gains for a third consecutive term, a feat rarely achieved due to anti-incumbency. Despite high SDG rankings, the state faces challenges in gender equality and economic growth, while migration and wage gaps emerge as key voter concerns.

title: BJP-dominant India or ... ? Decoding layers of saffron supremacy across country
description: The BJP's political dominance across India is undeniable, governing most states and the Centre. However, this influence varies significantly, with strongholds like Uttar Pradesh and Gujarat contrasting with regions where alliances are crucial. The party continues to expand its footprint, but challenges remain in the South and West Bengal, making upcoming elections a key test of its growth trajectory.

title: ‘I'm vegetarian, need to get my protein’: When Google CEO talked about his breakfast
description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai revealed his morning habits. He wakes early, reads news, and enjoys a vegetarian breakfast. Pichai is particular about his tea, describing it as very English. He exercises later in the day. Pichai also shared his favorite Indian dishes from Bengaluru, Delhi, and Mumbai. He enjoys Dosa, Chola Bhatura, and Pav Bhaji respectively.

title: Minecraft Bedrock 26.30.25/26 beta: How to download latest version
description: Minecraft Bedrock 26.30.25/26 beta and preview is now available, featuring content from the upcoming Chaos Cubed update, including Sulfur Cube Archetypes and Geysers. This beta allows players to test new features before their official release. The article details how to download and install the beta on PC, Xbox, PlayStation, Android, and iOS devices.
